title: Assigning subitem owner as additional contributor / assiting on parent item

posts.author: DRowe (David Rowe)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Team

I am wanting to create some basic automation where if a person is assigned to a subitem that they will be listed as either an additional owner, or as an assisting contributor to the parent item.

Is this possible, or am I wasting my time?

posts.author: aquibk (Aquib Zafar)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

You can have the summary of the Subitem’s column on to the parent column.

Regards,
Aquib Zafar
